training_status: powerlifter, 6 days/week gym, 500 lb deadlift, 1100 lb powerlifting club

benefits.description: Visceral fat reduction, gut deflation. Weight loss of 5 pounds over 6 weeks concentrated in abdominal area rather than overall body fat.
Visible reduction in visceral fat; able to zip coat that was previously too tight; noticeable improvement in abdominal appearance

protocol_notes: User fasted for at least 3 hours before dosing. Also on prescribed Mounjaro (semaglutide). Plans to continue at 2mg as long as affordable, hoping to maintain at least 1mg for 6 months. User is 2 years into weight loss journey (lost 250 lbs from starting weight of 550 lbs).
